objective: Commit the mostConnectedNode pure helper implementation and carto stats CLI extension for CART-S02-T03
key_changes: mostConnectedNode() pure helper added to graph.ts — counts from/to incidences, returns { node: Node | null, degree: number }
carto stats CLI extended to print most-connected node title and degree (or (no edges) sentinel)
4 vitest tests added for mostConnectedNode: no-edges sentinel, bidirectional degree, first-encountered tie-break, empty graph
files_changed: src/cli.ts — imported and used mostConnectedNode() in carto stats action
src/__tests__/graph.test.ts — added 4 unit tests for mostConnectedNode()
